# Outputs

This folder contains files generated by the reproducibility pipeline.

Most generated outputs are not committed to GitHub because they can be recreated from the raw data and may be large.

## Main generated file

The final report requires:

```text
outputs/report_bundle.rds
```

This file is created by:
```r
source("R/run_pipeline.R")
```
The Quarto report reads `outputs/report_bundle.rds` directly, so once this file exists the report can be rendered without rerunning the full pipeline.

## Typical generated outputs

The pipeline may generate files such as:
```text
outputs/WL_analysis_index.csv
outputs/WL_cleaning_log.csv
outputs/WL_daily_cleaned_signal_coverage.csv
outputs/WL_hourly_signal_eda.csv
outputs/validation_loco_metrics_overall_model_comparison.csv
outputs/report_bundle.rds
outputs/WL_cleaned_files/
```

## Recreate outputs

To recreate all outputs from the raw data, run:
```r
source("R/run_pipeline.R")
```
Then render the report:
```r
quarto::quarto_render("report.qmd")
```
